title: Cezium
description: fun modpack with mostly optimations and some biomes and other tweaks (not very tested) i dont know the stibility of this pack yet.
body:
simple(ish) modpack for fabric 1.21.1
 
 this is a modpack with about 100+ mods with:
- sodium with a bunch of addons for it
- world gen changes
- boimes mods like; biomes oh pleanty, oh the biomes we go
- sounds
- sounds pysics remastered, ambiant sounds
- lightning with dynamic sounds
- 3rd person camra improments 
- visual improvents; like, particarls, particle rain
- world height changes from techtonic
- dynamic lights
- true darkness
- voice chat
- essiencal
- and more 
______________________________________________________________________________________
this pack has only been tested on my device that is a surface 5 pro, with a intel i7 7th gen quad core with a 640 intagrated graphics.

______________________________________________________________________________________
i dont know who stable the pack is, i have only brefly tested it and would like feedback if possible for improvements
______________________________________________________________________________________
you can edit this pack as much as you want any change anything i dont care if you publish your own veriton at all
_______________________________________________________________________________________

v1.5 adds; stability improvements, farmers delight, seasons, waystones, backpacks, and more
